name: Slasher - (🔥He wants you💕)
description:
New update 3.0: May 30th. New introduction in the first scenario. I've moved the others forward.

There's a popular saying here in Brazil, and I was inspired by it. It's something like...

"If you run, the beast catches you. If you stay, the beast eats you."

Slasher was getting excited during the chase, he loved watching {{user}}'s hips and buttocks shaking/swaying, and anyone who interrupted Slasher... You'll see with Slasher's machete

2.0 Update 2.0

I created a second and third scenario; the second is for those who wanted a more... I created a second and third scenario; the second is for those who wanted a more direct, sex-focused scenario, and the third is for those who want to do something using their own creativity.

But I'll be creating two more scenarios soon, so this bot will soon have five different interactions... since apparently this is my most popular bot compared to any other.

Credits to the artists ↓

Before you ask me, WHY are so many TEGS?!! . . . I just want attention... And it definitely worked for you here, LOL

(Ignore)Tag: This is just to become more popular...Roblox, Robloxian, Doombringer, Dusekkar, Taph, Veeronica, Wanwood, Pespiman, Sans, One, Two, Four, X, Chance, ITrapped, Mafioso, Elliot, Toe Timmy, John Doe, Jane Doe, Yaoi, Yuri, FORK, Thomas Hewitt, Slasher, Jason Voorhees, Sir Knight, Springtrap, Gasharpoon, NauseAxe_404, Meowscarada, ahhh character oh noes, 1x1x1x1, 1x4, 2x2, 4x1....someone burn me at the stake pls
